overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy urban environment. The journey begins under a highway overpass, continues along city streets with construction cranes, crosses an intersection at Pacific Blvd, and ends along a palm-lined promenade with vendor stalls. The atmosphere is hazy with reduced visibility throughout.

events.description: exiting the covered overpass into open foggy street with construction cranes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath the highway overpass

notable_agents.action: person in red top and light pants walking toward camera then passing by on the right

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating covered walkway overhead
massive concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
orange metal scaffolding structure against the right wall
green metal railing separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark highway overpass with massive concrete pillars lining the right side. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing an orange scaffolding structure. A pedestrian in a red top walks toward and past the camera. Vehicles move along the multi-lane road to the left, separated by a green metal railing. The scene transitions as the camera approaches the bright, foggy exit of the covered walkway.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk with construction cranes visible on the left skyline

entered.detail: multiple tower cranes atop unfinished high-rise buildings
contemporary high-rise buildings with reflective glass facades
tall palm trees visible in the foggy distance along the street

segments.scene_description: Having exited the overpass, the scene opens into a foggy urban street. Construction cranes tower above unfinished buildings on the left, while modern glass high-rises line the street. The camera continues walking along the concrete sidewalk next to a green railing, with sparse traffic moving along the multi-lane road. Palm trees become visible in the hazy distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection at Pacific Blvd with industrial backdrop

events.description: approaching and crossing the multi-lane intersection at Pacific Blvd
crossing the street and transitioning from urban downtown to waterfront promenade area

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while navigating around vehicles stopped at the traffic light

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi and other vehicles stopped at the red traffic light

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with horizontal red lights
street sign reading 'Pacific Blvd' mounted on the traffic light structure
tall industrial chimneys emitting smoke visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a major intersection marked by a 'Pacific Blvd' street sign and traffic lights. Industrial smokestacks rise in the foggy distance beyond the intersection. The character crosses the asphalt crosswalk, navigating around vehicles stopped at the red light. Palm trees line the approaching sidewalk, becoming more prominent as the urban buildings fade into the fog behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy waterfront promenade with vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: walking along the palm-lined promenade past food vendor carts

entered.detail: distinctive triangular pyramid-shaped building with horizontal windows
wooden food vendor stalls with various containers and equipment
large yellow patio umbrella shading a vendor area
green metal railing along the edge of the promenade

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a foggy waterfront promenade lined with tall palm trees. A distinctive pyramid-shaped building dominates the right side, while food vendor carts with yellow umbrellas occupy the sidewalk. The camera moves past the wooden stalls along the paved walkway, with industrial smokestacks still visible in the far distance through the heavy fog. The green railing continues along the left side, separating the walkway from the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadows of a highway overpass into a hazy, palm-lined urban promenade. It begins beneath a dark concrete overpass, moving past massive pillars and orange scaffolding while a pedestrian in red crosses the path. As the camera exits the covered walkway, the scene opens into a foggy city street where towering construction cranes and glass high-rises emerge from the mist. The movement continues toward a major intersection at Pacific Blvd, crossing the asphalt as industrial smokestacks appear in the distance and palm trees become more prominent. Finally, the environment shifts into a waterfront promenade, gliding past yellow vendor umbrellas and a large pyramid-shaped building under a heavy, persistent fog.
